headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk (routine capex scale, not P&L risk) — Adani Power's green ammonia co-firing at Mundra plant signals incremental ESG alignment, limited near-term P&L impact
what_matters: BRSR, CDP, TCFD, GRI, EU Taxonomy frameworks triggered; no penalty or deadline risk as this is a voluntary initiative.
No current P/E compression or margin erosion; revenue at risk is negligible.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital if green financing is accessed, but no immediate bond spread impact.
